title: CyTOF mass cytometry dataset for "Aging of the adaptive immune system affects the gut microbiome and systemic levels of vitamin B6"
author: Stahl, Selina Natalie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains raw CyTOF / mass cytometry FCS files and associated metadata for the manuscript “Aging of the adaptive immune system affects the gut microbiome and systemic levels of vitamin B6”. 
 Samples were acquired using a Helios Mass Cytometer. The uploaded FCS files are raw data files and are organized by the original experiment folders, each compressed into a separate ZIP archive. 
 The dataset includes the following FCS ZIP archives: - EXP001-CTRL-BL6-300124.zip - EXP002-CTRL-BL6-060224.zip - EXP003-CTRL-BL6-022025.zip - EXP004-RAG1-Txt 180123.zip - EXP005-RAG1-Txt 180624.zip - EXP006-RAG1-Txt 310724.zip 
 Associated metadata are provided in: - experimentSamples.CYTOF.xlsx - reagents.CyTOF.xlsx - treatments.xlsx - protocols.xlsx 
 The file experimentSamples.CYTOF.xlsx links experimental sample IDs, biosample IDs, experiment IDs, reagent IDs, treatment IDs, and FCS result file names. Reagent, treatment, and protocol information are provided in the accompanying metadata files. 
 The dataset is deposited to support publication and reuse of the raw CyTOF data.
